dependencies: Dependence on coal, natural gas, and nuclear fuel suppliers
Dependence on equipment manufacturers for generation facilities
risks: Railroads may commit fewer resources to coal transportation as coal-fired facilities retire
Fuel oil cost increases and supply chain challenges
Domestic and global supply chain disruptions from pandemic health events or international tensions
Fuel price volatility; supply chain disruptions for materials and labor; transmission constraints; dependence on interstate natural gas pipelines; potential for fuel transportation unavailability
Global supply chain disruptions impacting equipment, materials, and resources delivery
Supply chain disruptions for equipment and materials
Supply chain disruptions could impact operations
Supply chain disruptions from weather, labor relations, natural disasters, cyber or physical attacks, force majeure events
Counterparties to coal supply contracts may not fulfill obligations due to financial or technical problems
Constraints in supply chain restricting availability and delaying construction, maintenance, or repair
Equipment delivery delays for construction projects
Cybersecurity threats to supply chain partners
Fuel supply interruptions or price volatility
Inflation, elevated interest rates, tariffs impacting supply chain costs
